property.name: include
property.value: Map:Common Data

properties.property: Shortcut door in the Green Room. Can transport the [[party]] to previous areas of the TV World: * TV World Entrance * Goulden Sam

property.name: page
property.value: Shortcut door

property.name: zh_description
property.value: 休息室内的传送门,在[[TV 时间]]第三轮返回后解锁.可以将[[小队]]传送至先前的区域.

property.name: zh_name
property.value: 传送门

property.name: zh_page
property.value: 传送

property.name: description
property.value: A [[Pippins]] appears here if the [[party]] achieved a rank lower than S on the previous round of ''[[TV Time]]''. They offer to sell an S-Rank bypass for 1500 [[POINT]]s.

property.name: zh_description
property.value: 在小队在于[TV 时间]]每轮未获得S或T级时,一个 [[Pippins]] 会出现在这里以1500[[点数]]的价格售卖S级.它在小队获得Z级时拒绝售卖.

properties.property: Offers [[weapons]] to the [[party]] to buy for [[POINT]]s. It sells the following: * [[Toxic Axe]] * [[Saber 10]] * [[Flex Scarf]] * [[TV Slop]]

property.name: page
property.value: Vending machine

properties.property: 用点数交易,贩售如下物品: {| class="sortable" style="text-align: left;" !物品 !价格 |- |[[剧毒斧]] |80 [[点数]] |- |[[刺刀10]] |80 [[点数]] |- |[[彎扭圍巾|彎扭圍巾]] |80 [[点数]] |- |[[電視糊糊]] |30 [[点数]] |}

property.name: zh_name
property.value: 自动贩卖机

property.name: zh_page
property.value: 自动贩卖机

properties.property: Offers [[armor]] and other [[item]]s to the [[party]] to buy, for [[POINT]]s in between Round 1 and 2 of ''TV Time'', and for [[Dark Dollar]]s at the end of the [[Chapter]]. It sells the following items: * [[TV Dinner]] * [[Deluxe Dinner]] * [[Lode Stone]] * [[Ginger Guard]]

property.name: page
property.value: Vending machine

properties.property: 在TV 时间第三轮前用点数交易,在第三轮后用黑暗币交易.其贩售以下物品: * [[电视餐]] * [[高档餐]] * [[磁石]] * [[姜饼护盾]]

property.name: zh_name
property.value: 自动贩卖机

property.name: zh_page
property.value: 自动贩卖机

property.name: description
property.value: Allows the [[party]] to sell their [[item]]s for [[Dark Dollar]]s.

property.name: page
property.value: Vending machine

property.name: zh_description
property.value: 一台逆向贩卖机.放入物品,吐出黑暗币.

property.name: zh_name
property.value: 自动贩卖机

property.name: zh_page
property.value: 自动贩卖机

property.name: description
property.value: Interacting with the [[vending machine]] allows the [[party]] to insert [[POINT]]s into the Ball Machine for a chance to win certain prizes.

property.name: page
property.value: Ball Machine

property.name: zh_description
property.value: 和[[自动贩卖机]]交互,[[小队]]可以向扭蛋机里投入[[点数]]来赢得奖品.

property.name: zh_name
property.value: 扭蛋机

property.name: zh_page
property.value: 扭蛋机

property.name: description
property.value: A [[Pippins]] blocks the doorway and offers to unlock the door in exchange for 500 [[POINT]]s.

property.name: zh_description
property.value: 一个 [[Pippins]] 挡住了门,要交500[[点数]]才放小队进去.

property.name: description
property.value: Offers to exchange [[Dark Dollar]]s for [[POINT]]s as well as some [[TV Slop]] to buy for POINTs.

property.name: page
property.value: Vending machine

property.name: zh_description
property.value: 这台自动贩卖机可以将点数兑换为黑暗币,同时也以20[[点数]]的价格贩售[[电视糊糊]].在完成[[原版游戏]]前还贩售标价免费,实际售价1点数的"微笑".

property.name: zh_name
property.value: 自动贩卖机

property.name: zh_page
property.value: 自动贩卖机

property.name: description
property.value: The location that houses the boards played in ''The Legend of Tenna''.

property.name: page
property.value: The Legend of Tenna

property.name: zh_description
property.value: 游玩Tenna传说的主地点.

property.name: zh_name
property.value: Tenna 传说

property.name: zh_page
property.value: Tenna 传说

property.name: description
property.value: A hallway containing doors that unlock after receiving at least a certain rank on the previous round of ''[[TV Time]]''. Extra pathways unlock if Z-Rank or T-Rank was attained.

property.name: page
property.value: Green Room#ABC-Rank Rewards Room

property.name: zh_description
property.value: 一个走廊,有三扇门,这些门会于在上一轮[[TV 时间]]中获得该等级及以上等级后解锁.获得T评级或Z评级会解锁额外的走廊.

property.name: zh_name
property.value: ABC 对应等级室

property.name: zh_page
property.value: 休息室#ABC 对应等级室

property.name: description
property.value: A hallway unlocked after receiving a T-Rank on the previous round of ''[[TV Time]]''. Contains a book at the end of the hallway.

property.name: page
property.value: Green Room#T-Rank Room

property.name: zh_description
property.value: 一个走廊,在先前[[TV 时间]]获得T评级后解锁.在走廊末尾有一本书.

property.name: zh_name
property.value: T 评级房间

property.name: zh_page
property.value: 休息室#T 级房间

property.name: description
property.value: A changing room that [[Kris]] enters alone, only accessible after receiving a Z-Rank on any round of ''[[TV Time]]''. Contains a manhole that leads to the [[Backstage]] area of the Green Room, allowing Kris to start or continue the [[Sword Route]].

property.name: page
property.value: Green Room#Z-Rank Changing Room

property.name: zh_description
property.value: 一个[[Kris]]会一个人进入的更衣室,仅在[[TV 时间]]当前一轮获得Z 评级时解锁.内有一个通往休息室后台的人洞,允许[[Kris]]前往游玩[[原版游戏]].

property.name: zh_name
property.value: Z 级更衣室

property.name: zh_page
property.value: 休息室#Z 级更衣室

property.name: description
property.value: A changing room that [[Kris]] enters alone, only accessible after receiving at least an S-Rank on any round of ''[[TV Time]]''. Has a door leading to the [[Backstage]] area of the Green Room, allowing Kris to start or continue the [[Sword Route]].

property.name: page
property.value: Green Room#S-Rank Changing Room

property.name: zh_description
property.value: 一个[[Kris]]会一个人进入的更衣室,仅在上一轮(或从Pippins手中)获得T或S评级时解锁.内有一扇通往后台的人,Kris可以由此去游玩[[原版游戏]].

property.name: zh_name
property.value: S 级更衣室

property.name: zh_page
property.value: 休息室#S 级更衣室

property.name: description
property.value: After attaining a T-Rank on any round of ''[[TV Time]]'', the [[party]] can read a page from this book.

property.name: zh_description
property.value: 一本书.介绍了Tenna高兴时摆出的TV姿势.

property.name: zh_name
property.value: T评级的书

properties.property:
Welcome to [[Ball Machine|BALL MACHINE]]. Insert [[POINT|points]] to gain PRIZES. The minimum is 100 POINTs. MORE POINTs increases GOLD CHANCE. Even if you miss GOLD PRIZE, nextime GOLD CHANCE increases faster! HIT the GOLD PRIZE, GOLD CHANCE will reset... etc. You turned to the camera and thanked [[Tenna]] tor a great toy! Thanks, Tenna!
... is, all part of what it said on the sign.
（“欢迎使用扭蛋机。投入点数即可获取奖品。”） （“每次至少投入100点数。投入的点数越多，获得金色奖励的概率越高。”） （“即使你没有获得金色奖励，下次的金奖概率也会更快提升！”） （“当你获得金色奖励时，金奖概率将被重置...”） （“你转向镜头向Tenna表达谢意！感谢你提供了这么棒的玩具，Tenna！”） （...告示牌上写着这些东西。）

property.name: zh_name
property.value: 告示牌

properties.property:
'''After board 1:''' (ACT 1 SCHEDULE)." (Various names and times are written on it.) ("ACT 2 SCHEDULE" is scrawled underneath in red pen...)
'''After board 2:''' It's the back of a paper. "ACT 3" is scrawled in red at the top.
*'''第一轮后:''' ** “（第一幕时间表）。”（下面标着各种名字和时间。） ** （下面用红笔潦草的写着“第二幕时间表”...） *'''第二轮后:''' （这是一张纸的背面。顶部用红笔潦草的写着“第三幕”。）

property.name: zh_name
property.value: 排班表

properties.property:
'''Initial:''' Stars ripple on the walls like soft music. You're filled with the power of relaxation.
'''Post-Island Board:''' The star pattern scrolls in an endless pattern... You're filled with the power of tessellation.
'''Post-TV World:''' After a performance, when all the actors have gone home... You feel a sense of emptiness.

property.name: description
property.value: In between ''[[TV Time]]'' rounds, the [[party]] meet here to discuss what to do next. In between rounds 1 and 2, [[Susie]] goes into the ''TV Time'' room alone to speak with [[Tenna]]. In between rounds 2 and 3, Susie grows suspicious of Tenna's actions.

property.name: zh_description
property.value: 在[[TV 时间]]每一轮的间隙,[[小队]]都会在这里讨论接下来该怎么做.在第一轮和第二轮期间,Susie一人去TV 时间房间和[[Tenna]]说话.在第二轮和第三轮,Susie对Tenna的行为起了疑心.

property.name: zh_name
property.value: TV 时间 (中场休息期)

property.name: description
property.value: [[Tenna]] holds phone calls in between rounds before hastily hanging up whenever the [[party]] approaches. This eventually causes [[Susie]] to grow suspicious of Tenna's true motivations.

property.name: zh_description
property.value: [[Tenna]] 在中场休息时偷偷通电话,并在[[小队]]靠近时非常急速地转过了身.这最终让[[Susie]]对他的真实目的产生了疑心.

property.name: zh_name
property.value: TV 时间中场休息

property.name: description
property.value: Inputting "[[1225]]" into the [[Ball Machine]] transports [[Kris]] to gacharoom_unknown, which is a large, open room that poses as a maze. Interacting with the blue Ball Machine within the room transports Kris back to the B-Rank room, and for the large Ball Machine to permanently disappear.

property.name: zh_description
property.value: 在[[扭蛋机]]里投入[[1225]]点数会将[[Kris]]传送到gacharoom_unknown.

property.name: description
property.value: The [[party]] can replay the Rock Video minigame through this door after unlocking it.

property.name: page
property.value: Rock Video

property.name: zh_description
property.value: [[小队]]可以通过这扇门重玩摇滚录像.

property.name: zh_name
property.value: 摇滚录像

property.name: zh_page
property.value: 摇滚录像

property.name: description
property.value: The [[party]] can replay the Cooking Show minigame through this door.

property.name: page
property.value: Cooking Show

property.name: zh_description
property.value: [[小队]]可以通过这扇门重玩厨艺大挑战.

property.name: zh_name
property.value: 厨艺大挑战

property.name: zh_page
property.value: 厨艺秀

property.name: description
property.value: The [[party]] can play the Monster Movie minigame through this door after unlocking it.

property.name: page
property.value: Monster Movie

property.name: zh_description
property.value: [[小队]]可以在解锁后进入这扇门游玩怪兽电影.

property.name: zh_name
property.value: 怪兽电影

property.name: zh_page
property.value: 怪兽电影

property.name: description
property.value: An alternate route that must be initiated in between rounds 1 and 2 of ''[[TV Time]]''. Completion of the route grants the [[Shadow Mantle]].

property.name: page
property.value: Sword Route

property.name: zh_description
property.value: 一个必须在[[TV 时间]]第一轮和第二轮才能开始的游戏.是[[剑路线]]的实际载体.

property.name: zh_name
property.value: 原版游戏

property.name: zh_page
property.value: 原版游戏

properties.property: A list of [[Tenna]]'s remaining employees, appearing after traversing the greater TV World. It serves to remind the [[party]] about which [[route]] they are on. * '''Recruited everyone:''' ''Looks like you've recruited everyone.'' * '''Missing recruits:''' ''Looks like you haven't recruited all of them yet.'' * '''LOST recruits:''' ''Looks like some people resigned due to getting hurt on the job. Seems you'll never recruit everyone.''
[[Tenna]]剩余员工的名单,在章末出现.小队可以通过它查看当前所处的[[路线]]. * '''全招揽''': 看来所有的员工都被你招揽了。 * '''招揽线''': 看来你还没招揽齐所有员工。 * '''暴力线''': ** (看来有些员工因工伤而辞职了。) ** (看来你永远没法招揽所有员工了。)

property.name: zh_name
property.value: 员工名单

property.name: description
property.value: Entryway that unlocks after progressing the [[Sword Route]] past the [[Ice Palace]] and traversing the greater TV World. The entryway leads to the area behind [[Ramb]]'s bar, from which [[Kris]] can witness [[Susie]] and [[Ralsei]] playing video games together.

property.name: zh_description
property.value: 有一条隐蔽的,通往[[Ramb]]吧台的通道,在章末完成[[原版游戏]]前可以进入.

property.name: zh_name
property.value: 通往吧台的路

property.name: description
property.value: Is friends with the [[Pippins]] next to him. Turns to stone after traversing the greater TV World.

property.name: zh_description
property.value: 和身旁的[[Pippins]]成了朋友,担心他因不适应这个暗世界而石化,但自己反而在章末石化.他的Pippins朋友透露他是Kris从[[Catty]]家顺来的.

property.name: description
property.value: Is friends with the [[Zapper]] next to him. After traversing the greater TV World, he laments that the Zapper turned to stone and urges the [[party]] to seal the [[Dark Fountain]].

property.name: zh_description
property.value: 和身旁的[[Zapper]]成了朋友,自信自己能够适应这个暗世界.在章末返回后,它非常痛惜[[Zapper]]的石化,并催促[[小队]]去封印[[黑暗喷泉]].

property.name: description
property.value: Blocks the way to the [[Cold Place]] under [[Tenna]]'s orders. After round 2 of ''[[TV Time]]'', the [[party]] can provoke him into attacking by selecting "Do nothing" when talked to. If "Push his buttons" is selected twice, he allows the party through without conflict.

property.name: zh_description
property.value: 在[[Tenna]]的命令下挡住了通往[[寒冷之地]]的路.在经过两轮[[TV 时间]]并见过Tenna后,小队可以在交谈时通过"什么都不做"来挑衅他攻击.若选两次"按他的按钮", 他会和平地给小队开路.

property.name: description
property.value: Gives the [[party]] an [[item]] depending on how they performed during each round of ''[[TV Time]]''.

properties.property: 会在前两轮[[TV 时间]]后根据当前轮的评级给予[[小队]]对应[[物品]]. {| |- ! 评级 !! 图版1 !! 图版2 |- ! scope="row" | T-级 |[[粉色缎带]] || [[白色缎带]] |- ! scope="row" | S-级 | [[粉色缎带]] || [[白色缎带]] |- ! scope="row" | A-级 | [[复活薄荷]] || [[紧迫宝石]] |- ! scope="row" | B-级 | [[复活薄荷]] || [[紧迫宝石]] |- ! scope="row" | C-级 | [[电视餐]] || [[磁石]] |- ! scope="row" | Z-级 | colspan="2" | 无奖励 |}

property.name: description
property.value: Explains to [[Kris]] that they and [[Asriel]] took them home from [[School]] and how the [[Rudinn]]s they also took with them got lost.

property.name: zh_description
property.value: 和[[Kris]]聊起他和[[Asriel]]把它们从[[学校]]带了回来,以及他俩带回来的[[Rudinn]]是怎样丢失了.

property.name: description
property.value: Explains the rewards for attaining each rank and which doors are available to the party. If Z-Rank is attained, the Zapper explains that they have unlocked none of the rooms and reveals a hallway to the east that leads to the Z-Rank changing room. After traversing the greater TV World, the Zapper is replaced with a [[vending machine]] which trades [[POINT]]s for [[Dark Dollar]]s.

properties.property: 向小队解释他们所获评级的奖励和对应解锁的门.若获得Z评级,该Zapper会解释他们哪扇门都不能进,并给小队开一条右边的走廊,通往Z级更衣室.在章末被一台把[[点数]]换为[[黑暗币]]的[[自动贩卖机]]取代. *'''评价等级''' **'''A'''----你在上一图版中获得了A级！A就是“傲”视群雄的A！ **'''B'''----你在上一图版获得了B级！B就是“霸”气十足的B！ **'''C'''----你在上一图版中获得了C级。C就是可“惜”的C！ *'''评价房间''' **A门通往盎然街机厅。你可以再玩一次体能大挑战。 **B门通往别样扭蛋机。你可以花费点数获取随机奖励！ **C门通往萃取冷水机。饮水请自便。

property.name: description
property.value: Is drinking water from the nearby [[Watercooler]]. If spoken to after defeating it, he mentions drinking water from an oasis eight times, which is a hint on a way to drain the oasis on the [[Desert Board]].

property.name: zh_description
property.value: 正在[[饮水机]]旁喝水.若在饮水机被战胜后交互,他会提及"在绿洲内喝八次水",这是对如何在[[沙漠图版]]内耗干绿洲的提示.

property.name: description
property.value: Is drinking water from the nearby [[Watercooler]]. If spoken to after defeating it, he remarks on how wars will be fought over the absence of water.

property.name: zh_description
property.value: 正在[[饮水机]]旁喝水.若在饮水机被战胜后交互,他会说由于水资源的匮乏,战争即将打响.

property.name: description
property.value: Explains how [[Susie]]'s Rude Buster deals more damage by timing [CONFIRM] to the hit.

property.name: zh_description
property.value: 解释了[[Susie]]的[[粗暴碎击]]可以通过按[确认]键来增强.

property.name: description
property.value: A [[Shadowguy]] behind the curtain, changing his socks. When revealed, he screams, and the curtain is pulled back.

property.name: zh_description
property.value: 浴帘后有一个 [[Shadowguy]] 在换他的袜子.在拉开浴帘时,他会惊叫一声,然后浴帘又被快速拉上了.

property.name: description
property.value: Is seen doing his makeup in preparation for round 2 of ''[[TV Time]]''.

property.name: zh_description
property.value: 在[[TV 时间]]的第一轮中场休息时于此处化妆.

property.name: zh_name
property.value: Rouxls Kaard

property.name: description
property.value: Explains that it got stuck to [[Kris]]'s clothes and expects to return to [[Castle]] town soon.

property.name: zh_description
property.value: 解释道它是从[[Kris]]的衣服上掉下来的灰尘,并希望不久后返回[[城堡镇]].

property.name: description
property.value: An unseen NPC behind the curtain. Gives [[Kris]] a [[Saber 10]] after the first round of ''[[TV Time]]''.

property.name: page
property.value: Curtain NPC

property.name: zh_description
property.value: 一个浴帘后的不可见NPC.在[[TV 时间]]中场休息交互时会给[[Kris]]一把[[刺刀 10]].

property.name: zh_name
property.value: Curtain NPC

property.name: description
property.value: Explains that the boards [[Kris]] has been playing had been modified by [[Tenna]] for his own purposes. After each board, he allows Kris to play the "original" versions of those boards.

property.name: zh_description
property.value: 解释道[[Kris]]先前游玩的图版是被[[Tenna]]有意修改过的.在每个图版后,他让Kris游玩这些图版的"原始"版本.

property.name: description
property.value: An unseen NPC stands here after round 1 of ''[[TV Time]]''. After round 2, the NPC is replaced with a [[Shuttah]], and after traversing the greater TV World, the NPC disappears.

property.name: page
property.value: Curtain NPC

property.name: zh_description
property.value: 在[[TV 时间]]第一轮后站在幕帘后的不可见NPC.在第二轮后,这个NPC被[[Shuttah]]取代.在探索了更大部分的TV 世界后,这个NPC会消失.

property.name: zh_name
property.value: Curtain NPC

property.name: description
property.value: Blocks the doorway to the S-Rank room. Allows [[Kris]] to pass through if they received or bought an S-Rank or higher during the first two rounds of ''[[TV Time]]''. Disappears after traversing the greater TV World.

property.name: zh_description
property.value: 挡住了通往S级更衣室的门.在确认[[Kris]]获得了S或T评级后才放Kris进入.在章末消失.

property.name: description
property.value: [[Kris]] picks up the Odd Controller from the ground after attempting to start the [[Original Game]] for the first time.

property.name: page
property.value: Odd Controller

property.name: zh_description
property.value: [[Kris]] 在首次尝试启动[[原版游戏]]后会被古怪手柄挡住回路.

property.name: zh_name
property.value: 古怪手柄

property.name: zh_page
property.value: 古怪手柄

property.name: description
property.value: Static encounter agaist a [[Watercooler]]. Awards 200 [[POINT]]s upon defeat.

property.name: zh_description
property.value: 碰到即开战<s>要的就是一个猝不及防</s>.在战胜后可在其留下的坑中获得200[[点数]].

property.name: zh_name
property.value: 饮水机

property.name: zh_page
property.value: 饮水机

property.name: description
property.value: Doorway to the Cold Place, a cold area at the edge of the TV World.

property.name: page
property.value: Cold Place

property.name: zh_description
property.value: 通往寒冷之地

property.name: zh_name
property.value: 寒冷之地

property.name: zh_page
property.value: 寒冷之地

property.name: description
property.value: Pathway to the greater TV World area, blocked off in between Round 1 and Round 2 of ''[[TV Time]]''.

property.name: page
property.value: TV World

property.name: zh_description
property.value: 去往更广阔的TV 世界,在[[TV 时间]]第一轮和第二轮期间被栏杆挡住.

property.name: zh_name
property.value: TV 世界

property.name: zh_page
property.value: TV 世界
